completed.description: Indicates if the task has been completed.

completedTime.description: Time at which the task was completed.

createdDateTime.description: Date and time the record was created. (Timezone: UTC)

delegates.description: Comma separated IDs of users to whom the task has been delegated.

lastModifiedBy.description: User who last modified the record.

lastModifiedDateTime.description: Date and time the record was last modified. (Timezone: UTC)

privateTask.description: Indicates if the task is private.

starred.description: Indicates if the task has been marked with a star.

tags.description: List of tags associated with the task.
